LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF WAYNE HOM'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED IN THE COURT'S DISCRETION UNDER CCP 437 C(E) SINCE PLAINTIFF'S MOTION RESTS ON HIS OWN DECLARATION AS TO HIS STATE OF MIND. IN ANY EVENT, DEFENDANT HAS RAISED A TRIABLE ISSUE IF MATERIAL FACT THROUGH HER DECLARATION AS TO THE 2007 EVICTION. OPPOSING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER PURSUANT TO CCP 437 C(G). JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189 (301/PJB)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-20-2009 Vacated

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Aug-21-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF WAYNE HOM'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED IN THE COURT'S DISCRETION UNDER CCP 437 C(e) SINCE PLAINTIFF'S MOTION RESTS ON HIS OWN DECLARATION AS TO HIS STATE OF MIND. IN ANY EVENT, DEFENDANT HAS RAISED A TRIABLE ISSUE IF MATERIAL FACT THROUGH HER DECLARATION AS TO THE 2007 EVICTION. Opposing party is to submit a proposed form of order pursuant to CCP 437 C(g). Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189 = (301/PJB)

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-20-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Nils Rosenquest; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Lois Jones. (Dept. 218).

Appearances:
Plaintiff, Wayne Kyle Hom is present.
Attorney, Joseph A. Sacramento appearing for the plaintiff.

Defendant, Maria E. Delgado is present.
Attorney, Paul Behrend representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed. The TERMS OF the SETTLEMENT is PLACED ON THE RECORD.

This case did settle. The trial date of AUG-03-2009 is vacated.

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Aug-14-2009 Continued To Aug-21-09 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. DAVID FORAN, TEL. NO. 775-0891 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
MARIA E. DELGADO, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER.

RULING - DEFENDAT MARIA E. DELGADO WAS SWORN AND WAS ALLOWED TO GIVE OFFER OF PROOF BY WAY OF ORAL EVIDENCE. PLAINTIFF WAYNE HOM'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS CONTINUED TO AUGUST 21, 2009. PLAINTIFF TO SUBMIT REPLY BRIEF BY THE END OF BUSINESS DAY OF AUGUST 18, 2009. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189
